name: Latte
shortDescription: Espresso with steamed milk and light foam.
whatIsIt: A latte is a popular espresso-based beverage made with one or more shots of espresso and steamed milk, topped with a light layer of foam. It is known for its smooth texture and balanced flavor.
flavorProfile: Mild sweetness from steamed milk, low bitterness, creamy mouthfeel, and subtle espresso richness.
funFacts: Often used as a base for flavored syrups.

name: Cold Brew
whatIsIt: Cold brew is coffee steeped in cold water for many hours, then filtered and served chilled. It is known for being smooth and mellow.
flavorProfile: Smooth, rich, mellow, and less acidic than traditional iced coffee.
funFacts: Usually stronger than regular iced coffee.

name: Cappuccino
shortDescription: Espresso with steamed milk and thick foam.
whatIsIt: A cappuccino is an espresso drink made with espresso, steamed milk, and a thick layer of foam.
flavorProfile: Stronger espresso taste than a latte, with airy foam and creamy texture.
funFacts: Known for its equal parts espresso, milk, and foam.
A classic morning coffee in Italy.

name: Americano
shortDescription: Espresso diluted with hot water for a smooth, bold flavor.
whatIsIt: An Americano is made by adding hot water to espresso, creating a coffee similar in strength to drip coffee but with a different flavor profile.
flavorProfile: Bold and smooth, with espresso character but a lighter body than straight espresso.
funFacts: Can be served hot or iced.

name: Mocha
shortDescription: Espresso blended with chocolate and steamed milk.
whatIsIt: A mocha combines espresso, steamed milk, and chocolate for a sweet coffeehouse favorite.
flavorProfile: Sweet, creamy, and rich, with both coffee and chocolate flavors.
funFacts: Named after Mocha, a port city in Yemen.

name: Flat White
shortDescription: Velvety microfoam poured over rich espresso.
whatIsIt: A flat white is an espresso drink with steamed milk and fine microfoam, usually stronger than a latte.
flavorProfile: Smooth and creamy with a stronger espresso-forward flavor than a latte.
funFacts: Especially popular in Australia and New Zealand.

name: Macchiato
shortDescription: Espresso “stained” with a small amount of foam.
whatIsIt: A traditional macchiato is espresso topped with just a small amount of milk foam.
flavorProfile: Bold, intense, and only lightly softened by milk.
funFacts: Traditional macchiatos are much smaller than flavored chain versions.
Great for people who want mostly espresso.

name: Iced Coffee
shortDescription: Freshly brewed coffee chilled and served over ice.
whatIsIt: Iced coffee is regular brewed coffee that is cooled and poured over ice.
flavorProfile: Refreshing and crisp, with familiar brewed coffee taste.
funFacts: Easy to customize with milk or syrups.

name: Chai Latte
shortDescription: Spiced black tea blended with steamed milk.
whatIsIt: A chai latte is made with spiced black tea concentrate and steamed milk.
flavorProfile: Sweet and warmly spiced with cinnamon, cardamom, and clove notes.
funFacts: Often made from black tea and spices.

name: Matcha Latte
shortDescription: Japanese green tea powder whisked with steamed milk.
whatIsIt: A matcha latte is made from powdered green tea whisked with milk for a bright, earthy drink.
flavorProfile: Earthy, grassy, slightly sweet, and creamy.
funFacts: Matcha is finely ground green tea powder.
Traditionally used in Japanese tea ceremonies.
Contains caffeine but usually less than coffee.
